title: ISSOnScreenDisplay
description: Adds a widget to your screen with a constant value of the urine tank quantity on the International Space Station
body:
Adds a on-screen widget that has the ISS Urine Tank Quantity on display
Updates when the urine tank fills or empties and plays a sound in-game
Comes with Mod Menu Support for editing config in-game

Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/MAZE2EWFR9) for support

You can always be informed of how full the tank is on the International Space Station in Near real-time

Architectury API API Required

# Recommended mods
[ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (allows editing the config in-game)

# Advertisement
https://youtu.be/JwjpDEqPBoI
